TG WS Proxy Apple builds

This page is published automatically by GitHub Actions.

Each workflow run uploads two artifacts:

  • tg-ws-proxy-iphone-app-unsigned (for iPhone, unsigned .app bundle)
  • tg-ws-proxy-macos-app (native macOS .app)
  1. Open repository Actions.
  2. Select Build Apple apps + deploy Pages workflow run.
  3. Download the required artifact.
